title: WitcheryPatch
description: A small mod that uses ASM to patch some bugs in Witchery.
body:
WitcheryPatch is a small mod for Minecraft that uses ASM to fix some bugs within Witchery, since Emoniph has vanished.

## Bugs fixed by WitcheryPatch
The NEI integration for the Distillery properly shows all recipes, rather than the first matching one. For example, without WitcheryPatch, viewing the recipe for the Demonic Blood would show the recipe that takes a Diamond Vapor, but not the one that takes a Netherrack. (See images.)

If there are other bugs you'd like me to patch, let me know via [the issue tracker] and I'll be sure to take a look at it.

## Logo notes:
* Hat from the Witchery logo is in the public domain via ClipArtLord.
* Binnie Patcher logo used with consent from Chocohead.
* This mod has nothing to do with bees.
